der dritte: <!doctype html>
            <html lang="en">
              <head>
                  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Roboto+Slab:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
                  <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://rsms.me/inter/inter.css" />

                  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
                  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="/23.svg?v=8" />
                  <meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow, noarchive">
                  <script defer src="https://cloud.umami.is/script.js" data-website-id="9e0ccaf1-08bb-4ab5-b42a-5f7a893090a6"></script>
                  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/ua-parser-js@1.0.37/dist/ua-parser.min.js" defer></script>




                  <script>

                      (function waitForUmamiAndParser() {
                          function ready() {
                              return typeof window.UAParser === 'function' &&
                                  (typeof window.umami === 'object' || typeof window.umami === 'function' || typeof window.umami?.track === 'function');
                          }

                          function sendDeviceInfo() {
                              try {
                                  const parser = new window.UAParser();
                                  const result = parser.getResult();


                                  const deviceType = result.device.type || ( /Mobi|Android|iPhone|iPad|iPod/i.test(navigator.userAgent) ? 'mobile' : 'desktop' );
                                  const deviceModel = result.device.model || null;
                                  const os = result.os.name || null;
                                  const osVersion = result.os.version || null;
                                  const browser = result.browser.name || null;
                                  const browserVersion = result.browser.version || null;

                                  const screenWidth = window.screen?.width || null;
                                  const screenHeight = window.screen?.height || null;
                                  const devicePixelRatio = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;


                                  const rawUserAgent = navigator.userAgent || null;

                                  const payload = {
                                      deviceType,
                                      deviceModel,
                                      os,
                                      osVersion,
                                      browser,
                                      browserVersion,
                                      screenWidth,
                                      screenHeight,
                                      devicePixelRatio,
                                      userAgent: rawUserAgent
                                  };


                                  Object.keys(payload).forEach(k => { if (payload[k] === null) delete payload[k]; });


                                  if (window.umami && typeof window.umami.track === 'function') {
                                      window.umami.track('device-info', payload);
                                  } else if (typeof window.umami === 'function') {

                                      window.umami('trackEvent', 'device-info', payload);
                                  } else {

                                      console.warn('Umami tracker not available - device-info not sent.');
                                  }
                              } catch (err) {

                                  console.error('device info tracking failed', err);
                              }
                          }

                          if (ready()) {

                              setTimeout(sendDeviceInfo, 200);
                          } else {

                              let tries = 0;
                              const iv = setInterval(() => {
                                  if (ready() || ++tries > 25) {
                                      clearInterval(iv);
                                      if (ready()) sendDeviceInfo();
                                  }
                              }, 200);
                          }
                      })();
                  </script>
